title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding with teams in Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer who builds flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating across time zones with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri is a near-perfect match—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM exceeds the 7+ year requirement, Fintech aligns with his strong fit verticals, and his Salesforce expertise directly matches their core need. The distributed Tel Aviv/NY structure with Tel Aviv HQ is ideal for his location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15 years scaling RevOps and GTM engines in B2B SaaS, including deep Salesforce and revenue analytics work across high-growth companies. Finout's cloud cost-management thesis is compelling, and your Tel Aviv/NY distributed model caught my eye—I'm based in the area and have led cross-timezone revenue operations. I'd be interested in exploring how I can help you build the RevOps infrastructure to scale beyond your current ARR.

title: RevOps Manager
description: HopSkipDrive, a technology company solving complex transportation challenges, seeks a RevOps Manager with 3-5 years of Sales Operations or RevOps experience in a high-growth B2B SaaS or marketplace environment. Responsibilities include analyzing sales performance data, maintaining CRM hygiene, leading sales enablement, supporting forecasting, and administering pricing and incentive compensation. Requires exceptional analytical skills, expertise with Salesforce, Tableau, and Coefficient, strong project management discipline, and an owner mindset. Reports to the Director of Revenue Operations. Salary $90k-$120k.
score_reason: Strong technical fit (Salesforce, analytics, forecasting, CRM hygiene) and B2B SaaS background, but role is at manager level reporting to Director—below Omri's senior executive experience. Salary range ($90k-$120k) is significantly below market for a 15+ year senior RevOps leader, suggesting potential career step-down.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I noticed HopSkipDrive is building out revenue operations to scale your transportation marketplace. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM motions and deep Salesforce expertise, I've built forecasting frameworks and sales enablement systems that drive predictable growth—though I'm curious whether this role might evolve into a broader Revenue Operations leadership position given your growth trajectory.

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager

With 15+ years building revenue funnels at high-growth B2B SaaS companies, I've spent the last decade optimizing Salesforce reporting, pipeline forecasting, and GTM tool stacks for rapid growth – exactly the data-driven insights you're looking to establish in your first 90 days.

title: Growth Marketing Lead
description: Own how Theator shows up in the market. Turn product and engineering outcomes into market momentum, demand, and qualified leads. Translate complex AI surgical platform capabilities into simple outcome-driven stories. Own channel strategy: LinkedIn, email, partnerships, communities, events. AI fluency required — actively use AI to create leverage. High autonomy, fast-moving startup.
score_reason: Strong match — Growth Marketing Lead at AI healthtech startup in Tel Aviv. High autonomy, AI-native, full-funnel ownership. Israel-based.
ai_opener: Omri here — turning complex product capabilities into clear market momentum is exactly what I do. At Theator specifically, I'm drawn to the challenge of making surgical AI impossible to ignore in a market where credibility and proof points are everything.
